description: The Albanian mafia is a general term for various criminal organizations based in Albania, Kosovo, and other Albanian-majority territories, or composed of ethnic Albanians. Known for ferocity and violence, they are active in drug trafficking, arms smuggling, and human trafficking across the United States and European Union. Their roots lie in traditional clan structures and the Kanun code, and they expanded internationally after the fall of communism and the Kosovo War.

country_links.evidence_quote: Tradicionalmente, la heroína había sido transportada a Europa Occidental a través de ... Croacia ...
country_links.context: Heroin was traditionally transported to Western Europe through Croatia, and the Albanian mafia later took over the route.

country_links.evidence_quote: los delincuentes aprovecharon la situación para extenderse rápidamente por toda Europa , en primer lugar a las comunidades emigrantes albanesas de Alemania ... monopolizando el tráfico de heroína.
country_links.context: The Albanian mafia spread to Albanian emigrant communities in Germany, monopolizing heroin trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: Una base clave de las operaciones fue Veliki Trnovac , al sur de Serbia ...
country_links.context: The Albanian mafia had a key base of operations in Veliki Trnovac, southern Serbia, and used the heroin route through Serbia.

country_links.evidence_quote: Tradicionalmente, la heroína había sido transportada a Europa Occidental a través de ... Eslovenia .
country_links.context: Heroin was traditionally transported to Western Europe through Slovenia, and the Albanian mafia later took over the route.

country_links.evidence_quote: los delincuentes aprovecharon la situación para extenderse rápidamente por toda Europa , en primer lugar a las comunidades emigrantes albanesas de ... Suiza , monopolizando el tráfico de heroína.
country_links.context: The Albanian mafia spread to Albanian emigrant communities in Switzerland, monopolizing heroin trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: Tradicionalmente, la heroína había sido transportada a Europa Occidental a través de Turquía ...
country_links.context: Heroin was traditionally transported to Western Europe through Turkey, and the Albanian mafia later took over the route.

country_links.evidence_quote: Su espectro delictivo es muy activo en los Estados Unidos ... ya que participan en una amplia gama de actividades como tráfico de drogas , de armas y trata de personas .
country_links.context: The Albanian mafia is very active in the United States, participating in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, and human trafficking.
